_meta.purpose: common bootstrap and reconciliation preflight. Per-role reads live in agents/workflow/roles/<role>.json > preflight.

common_kickoff.validate_workflow_truth_source: before citing workflow concepts, confirm their existence in the current state of methodology.md and agents/workflow/*

allowed: versioned canonical governance: methodology.md, agents/workflow/*, agents/governance/*, and the context map when the role/preflight requires it
active item (feature): status.yaml, the phase's active artifact and only the files derived from the write scope or the minimal bootstrap of the current phase
active item (fix): the active branch's git log and the product files needed for the correction in progress (scope derived by the human copilot)
templates in agents/templates/* when the phase or role requires creating/validating artifacts
skills in agents/skills/* only when explicitly required by the preflight, by scope.md or by the active revision (feature lane). In the fix lane, skills are an optional resource without a gate
forbidden: reading agents/features/<other>/ or agents/fixes/<other>/ outside the active item
reading agents/archive/ as operational session context
expanding reads to history, persisted memory or artifacts of other lanes without explicit human authorization
read_scope_policy.escalation: if the minimal read scope is not enough, stop and request explicit human authorization in chat to expand the reading before continuing, in a single objective message per transitions.json > communication_contract

preflight_reconciliation.purpose: detect drift between status.yaml, versioned artifacts and git before any write in the feature lane
steps: load agents/workflow/transitions.json > invariants and validate each invariant applicable to the feature_complete lane against the current state
compare tasks[].commit and phases[].completed_at against the branch's git log
confirm the baseline exists in the history
if any invariant is violated or a divergence is detected: stop, signal the human and await reconciliation
preflight_reconciliation.on_violation: record the divergence in chat in a single objective message per transitions.json > communication_contract and stop the session; do not attempt to auto-correct status.yaml without explicit human approval

fix_lane_exemption.rationale: the fix lane uses neither status.yaml nor revisions/; state lives in the branch's commits and the human copilots in real time
minimal_fix_preflight: confirm the active branch: if ambiguous, ask the human before any write
read the branch's git log to understand what has been done (recovery)
